description: Component for ingesting TikTok Ads data using dlt - returns DataFrames.

asset_name.label: Asset Name
asset_name.description: Name of the asset that will hold the TikTok Ads data

access_token.label: Access Token
access_token.description: TikTok Marketing API Access Token. Use ${TIKTOK_ACCESS_TOKEN} for env vars.

advertiser_ids.label: Advertiser Ids
advertiser_ids.description: Comma-separated list of TikTok Advertiser IDs (e.g.,

resources.label: Resources
resources.description: Comma-separated list of resources to extract: advertisers, campaigns, ad_groups, ads, videos, images, reports

data_level.label: Data Level
data_level.description: Data aggregation level: AUCTION_ADVERTISER, AUCTION_CAMPAIGN, AUCTION_ADGROUP, or AUCTION_AD

include_sample_metadata.label: Include Sample Metadata
include_sample_metadata.description: Include sample data preview in metadata

destination_config.label: Destination Config
destination_config.description: Optional destination configuration as connection string or JSON. Required if destination is set.

persist_and_return.label: Persist And Return
persist_and_return.description: If True with destination set: persist to database AND return DataFrame. If False: only persist to database.

deps.label: Deps
deps.description: Upstream asset keys this asset depends on (e.g. [
